title: Create: World of Color - Feed The Machine
description: Create Addons for Create: World of Color :P
body:
## _"Thank you for the fish!‌"_ ![Minecraft logo style, reading CREATE on the top line and WORLD OF COLOR on the bottom, followed by FTM and FEED THE MACHINE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a16411d5992b272d93a984cdde27c358b2aa001c.png) # ![Some tiny item textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b97d1e401b948e75cdd26f84e30363421c655b1d.png) **[CWOC](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-world-of-color) - Feed The Machine** ![More tiny item textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64b8743b9c660938d0ea0ca7bd2fbec0318b2b17.png) ...is a resource pack designed to emulate what [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)'s many addons would look like in Minecraft's **Programmer Art** style!

[![A button with text that says Report Issues](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4810204932f5155b4cb528e3f384c3727e7b6170.png)](https://github.com/soapinamicrowave/cwoc-ftm/issues) [![A button with text that says Gallery Images](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56e08febc882d3ce054ad32238f9e997d95de29a.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cwoc-ftm/gallery) [![A button with text that says View Source](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/165bb894282cb777e4127ebfffe7be8a34e0251f.png)](https://github.com/soapinamicrowave/cwoc-ftm) ## Supported Addons Addons with a red circle indicate their textures were made by [Flabberghastio](https://modrinth.com/user/flabberghastio)! [![Banner/button that says Aeronautics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88da36d43656132c179dfffba6c746911a592e28.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-aeronautics) [![Banner/button that says Hypertubes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de6b8ce725228a3039de68687fc76f44fd7ea832.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hypertube) [![Banner/button that says Bits 'n' Bobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae7b1e90f3da2226a484ebd5747630c7fca27642.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-bits-n-bobs) [![Banner/button that says Melodies & Mechanisms](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e79961468125bc4bb173743dc5ab5e2229523cd1.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-melodies-mechanisms) [![Banner/button that says Totem Factory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dce7e7ecd70729cef59f2a4eba1e0081e45a245.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-totem-factory) ## Recommendation [![A button with PACP's pack.png on it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/412fa3790da06dd8525167ddd334ec090b7d4db4.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp)
As per usual, add [Programmer Art Continuation Project](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pacp) underneath this pack and CWOC, but above the regular **Programmer Art** for the optimal experience.
(A lot of palettes or textures in this pack take direct reference off of PACP for parity!)
